title: Revival Priest returns existing creature to hand before summoning

card.rawText: Summon a creature from your cemetery to the field. If this card is removed from the field, send the creature back to the cemetery. If you have a creature on the field already, send it back to your hand.

plan.title: Revival Priest returns existing creature to hand before summoning
plan.summary: Play Revival Priest while player_1 already has a primary creature, then verify that existing primary returns to hand before the cemetery creature is summoned.

notes: Place test_primary_creature on player_1 field as primary.
Put another creature in player_1 cemetery before play.

steps: Resolve the cemetery creature target prompt.
Inspect player_1 hand and magic slots.
manualVerification: Confirm the returned creature keeps normal hand ownership and is not sent to cemetery.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the pre-summon cleanup clause.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
